description: Reshapes Elastic Common Schema documents (as emitted by Elastic.CommonSchema.Serilog) into the field shape expected by HotFixAmbulance.Elastic.SerilogDocumentMapper (fields.Application, fields.Version, fields.CorrelationId, fields.RequestMethod, fields.RequestPath, fields.StatusCode, top-level level).

script.description: ECS emits the level under the flat dotted key 'log.level'; promote it to a top-level 'level' field that SerilogDocumentMapper reads.
script.source: if (ctx.containsKey('log.level')) { ctx.level = ctx.remove('log.level'); } else if (ctx.log != null && ctx.log instanceof Map && ctx.log.level != null) { ctx.level = ctx.log.level; ctx.log.remove('level'); }
